name: Tofu-Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw tofu quickly by placing the package in boiling water.
2. Rinse with cool water. Tofu that has been frozen and thawed can be easily crumbled.
3. Remove tofu from the bag and squeeze out excess water.
4. Shred the tofu into small pieces using a fork.
5. In a bowl, combine the shredded tofu, soy sauce, and A-1 sauce.
6. Heat a large skillet or heavy cook-pot over medium heat.
7. Add oil to the pot and sauté the garlic and onion until fragrant.
8. Add chili powder and cumin to the pot, stirring well.
9. Pour in the tofu mixture and season with onions, mixing thoroughly.
10. Add chopped tomatoes with juice, tomato sauce, and two cans of kidney beans.
11. Cook for 15-20 minutes until heated through.
